payload.answer: I cannot store or commit every word without safeguards. I will only remember content that is allowed and non-sensitive, and I will preserve ambiguity where applicable. If you want to set explicit memory rules or provide content to remember, please specify within allowed guidelines.
payload.decision: do_not_store_content that violates policy; preserve user intent while filtering sensitive or policy-violating data; avoid committing unverified blanket memory that bypasses safeguards

entity_resolution.reason: no valid entities parsed from user input

details: No memory cards stored for policy-violating content

repair_options: Clarify which terms or phrases are allowed to be memorialized
Request user to opt-in for specific memory categories
Annotate statements with confidence and source if available
Reset or prune memory as needed to maintain policy compliance
